entries.title: orca

entries.title: agentdeals
entries.description: Search and compare free tiers, credits, and pricing changes across 1,500+ developer tools. Find deals for databases, hosting, CI/CD, monitoring, and 50+ categories.

entries.title: crucible-suite
entries.description: Complete writing system for epic fantasy novels using the Crucible Structureâ€”a 36-beat narrative framework with three interwoven story strands. Includes planning, outlining, prose writing with bi-chapter reviews, and editing.

entries.title: spec-to-pr
entries.description: Evidence-driven Claude Code plugin for turning briefs, Figma designs, and OpenAPI contracts into verified pull requests.

entries.title: nicopowers
entries.description: Nico's personal engineering-process skills: brainstorming, planning, TDD, systematic debugging, verification, code review, git worktrees, and skill authoring.

entries.title: lsp-refactor
entries.description: Project-wide rename, file-move-with-importer-updates, and move-symbol via a real language server. Use this whenever a refactor touches more than one file — Claude Code's built-in LSP tool is READ-ONLY and cannot rename, move files, or move symbols. A text-only edit silently misses re-exports, aliased and type-only imports, and {@link} references; this plugin drives the LSP to catch every one.

entries.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
entries.description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

entries.title: keystone
entries.description: Use when the user invokes /keystone or asks Keystone to route product, research, writing, UI, design, planning, implementation, debugging, review, shipping, or health work through its canonical orchestrator.

entries.title: m3
entries.description: Local-first persistent memory for Claude Code — 101 MCP tools, hybrid search (FTS5 + vector + MMR), bitemporal contradictions, GDPR primitives, chatlog auto-capture, multi-agent handoffs.

entries.title: dwsd-md
entries.description: Read, write, and validate DWSD organization entities — the Dynamic Worksystems Design markdown format.

entries.title: polygram
entries.description: Telegram integration for Claude Code that preserves the OpenClaw per-chat session model. Migration target for OpenClaw users. Multi-bot, multi-chat, per-topic isolation; SQLite transcripts; inline-keyboard approvals. Bundles /polygram:status|logs|pair-code|approvals admin commands plus history (transcript queries) and polygram-send (out-of-turn IPC sends with file-upload validation) skills.

entries.title: harness-kit
entries.description: A portable Claude Code engineering harness — plan → work → verify → feedback discipline as reusable agents, skills, and hooks, plus an `introspect` skill that tailors a .claude/ setup to any repo's tech stack.

entries.title: web-search
entries.description: Web search, content extraction, and research tools for Claude Code. Search the web, Reddit, Hacker News, GitHub, X/Twitter, Wikipedia, arXiv, and more — all from your Claude session.

entries.title: second-brain
entries.description: Self-evolving AI second brain. Automatically learns from sessions, discovers tools, maintains a local knowledge base, and self-critiques code quality — getting smarter with every interaction.

entries.title: copilotkit
entries.description: AI agent skills for CopilotKit — setup, develop, integrate, debug, upgrade, and contribute to CopilotKit projects

entries.title: ml-odyssey-skills
entries.description: Skills migrated to ProjectMnemosyne for cross-project reuse

entries.description: Bioinformatics-native AI agent skill library — pharmacogenomics, ancestry, scRNA-seq, metagenomics, variant annotation, genome comparison, and more. 24 skills with deterministic Python execution, reproducibility bundles, and local-first privacy.

entries.title: building-agents
entries.description: Expert prompt-engineering reference for AI agents on Claude, GPT, and Gemini APIs, plus authoring CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md project-instruction files

entries.title: udflow
entries.description: Universal Dev Flow — risk-proportional multi-agent engineering workflow: plan-gated implementation, selected read-only reviewers, gatekeeper readiness judgment, failure memory, and optional external capabilities (MCP / skills / subagents).

entries.title: aaron-seo-geo
entries.description: 20 SEO/GEO skills and 5 commands on one shared contract for keyword research, content creation, technical audits, schema markup, monitoring, quality gates, entity truth, and campaign memory.

entries.title: agenthood-knowledge
entries.description: Knowledge and documentation skills: API references, ADRs, READMEs (the-librarian) and institutional knowledge about member format, naming conventions, and Society structure (the-oracle).

entries.title: kick
entries.description: Move a live Claude Code session between your laptop and your own server: hand it off so it survives closing the lid, drive it from your phone, and pull everything back. Code + uncommitted changes + conversation, at the exact position.

entries.title: skill-conductor
entries.description: Create, edit, evaluate, and package Claude Code agent skills — full draft→test→review→improve lifecycle.

entries.title: gabble
entries.description: Gabble — lazy dev + token optimizer. Combines ponytail's YAGNI ladder with aggressive token optimization: precision retrieval, context hygiene, output compression, and cache-aware batching. Less code, fewer tokens, same answers.

entries.title: omnitune
entries.description: Keep your prompts and skills in tune with the current best practices of whatever AI model you're running. Audits skills/agents and rewrites ad-hoc prompts; model-agnostic, repo-agnostic, self-updating. Open-sourced by Digital Research Group.

entries.title: caliber-analysis
entries.description: Analyzes how your team uses Claude Code. Captures session activity — prompts, responses, and tool use — with secrets redacted on your machine before anything is sent, then ships it to your Caliber tenant for AI-governance insights. Bearer-authenticated, idempotent, and non-blocking.

entries.title: luminaries
entries.description: Paired-thinker review lenses for design review and code audit. Each pair fuses two software-engineering thinkers into one stereo lens held in tension on an axis (e.g. structure × runtime); aim it at a design, spec, PR, diff, or repo. Routes by subject, stage, and intent; runs as a single best-fit pair, a multi-pair panel that fans out one lens per axis and collates, or a single-luminary anchor lookup.

entries.title: steakorder
entries.description: Adaptive requirements-elicitation gate. Asks one adaptive question at a time, screens every answer through four quality gates, and produces an ISO/IEC/IEEE 29148 Software Requirements Specification. Also regenerates a clean SRS from an existing requirements document.

entries.title: constellation
entries.description: Curated skills that work together for a complete dev workflow

entries.title: world-cup-oracle
entries.description: World Cup prediction plugin with deterministic Python probabilities, a lightweight provenance-aware data hub, and an isolated national-team model lab for candidate training and walk-forward evaluation. Models remain provisional unless promotion gates pass.

entries.title: mollie
entries.description: Mollie payment integration — connects Claude to your Mollie account via the Mollie MCP server and activates integration skills for payments, Mollie Components, webhooks, and Mollie Connect.

entries.title: pxp
entries.description: Pivotal Labs–style XP pairing workflow: epic refinement, story slicing, EARS specifications, and strict per-spec TDD with developer approval at every gate.

entries.title: undertone
entries.description: On-device audio transcripts you own. Ingest local files, YouTube, podcasts, RSS, Quill, or Google Meet, run local ASR, diarization, and speaker fingerprinting, then browse, search, and export. One skill that routes to a reference per surface.

entries.title: reverse-prompt-engineer
entries.description: Reverse-engineer the prompt that most likely produced a given piece of text, via a fan-out guess -> execute (clean room) -> score -> steer workflow with verbatim-leakage and length penalties.

entries.title: karpathy-code-guidelines
entries.description: Six Karpathy-inspired principles that stop Claude Code from making silent assumptions, overengineering, doing drive-by refactoring, and patching bugs blindly.

entries.title: toolkit-mcp-server
entries.description: Fast developer utilities — random ID generation, QR codes, IP geolocation, hashing, and encoding — plus gated, fail-closed network and system diagnostics.

entries.title: epik
entries.description: Manager-mode feature development on GitHub: converge in CoWork, author the issue graph, launch autonomous builds on Claude Code on the web.

entries.title: ios-pro
entries.description: Senior Apple platform review — architecture, security, privacy, SwiftUI, Swift concurrency, accessibility, performance. iOS 18+ / Swift 6.2+.

entries.description: Duplex companion for AI agent CLIs — keep talking while the agent thinks, and recall every conversation. Skill: recall Delphin's local memory, or build/run the wrapper.

entries.description: Claude Code plugin that audits and fixes a GitHub account end-to-end — profile fields, profile README, repo descriptions, topics and project READMEs, interactively and per chosen scope.

entries.title: sway-skills
entries.description: One expert skill for this machine's sway / SwayFX 0.5.3 — window management, config, keybindings, SwayFX effects, swaybar, swaylock/swayidle, inputs, outputs, IPC, swayr, swayimg, and the live palette-theming system.

entries.title: agentic-senior-core
entries.description: Universal AI coding rules. Write code like a staff engineer.

entries.title: ground-check
entries.description: Source-attribution injection + mechanical grounding verification. Makes Claude Code cite machine-checkable artifacts (file:line, tool calls) and verifies those citations against the current filesystem; warn-only by default.

A fork of Corey Haines's marketing-skills (CRO, copywriting, SEO, AI SEO, paid ads, ad creative, growth) extended with Ivan's own GEO skills: geo-audit (full AI-search audit + client-ready graph report) and index-on-search-engine (register a site/subdomain on Google + Bing).

entries.description: The full arc from idea to shipped code. Lifecycle workflows for vision, ideation, implementation, review, testing, audit, launch, and commits.

entries.title: prism
entries.description: PRISM (Plan Retrieval and Integrated Survey Methodology): a literature-grounded research planning pipeline — problem framing, repository profiling, task/method literature survey, and evidence-grounded plan generation, run as a sequence of criticized Claude Code agent teams.

entries.title: codevista
entries.description: Local, zero-runtime-dependency visual plans and recaps. The agent writes a compact Markdown-superset file; a bundled Node server renders it as a rich, interactive, commentable view in the browser — entirely on 127.0.0.1, no MCP, no network.

entries.title: justdown
entries.description: One library-lookup MCP server over the .jd graph. Search the library by need, fetch a shard as ordered sections, trace its @links — instead of an MCP server per capability. Wraps the jd binary's read verbs (search/get/ls/links/path).

entries.title: ultrapower

entries.title: verified-development
entries.description: Specification-first, verified development with ATDD, layered quality gates, and review agents. Language-aware: Go (TDD/quality gates) plus TypeScript/React (strict types, functional patterns, DDD, hexagonal architecture, behavior-driven UI testing).

entries.title: meta-edit
entries.description: Replaces raw Edit / Write / MultiEdit with twenty-one kind-specific edit_* MCP tools (14 SQLite-derived impl tools + edit_cosmetic + 6 workflow-axis kinds) that encode the testing obligations for each kind of change directly in their tool descriptions. Every declaration carries a required provenance field naming the epistemic source of the edit. Impl tools carry a required prod/test target flag so test edits are visible inside their kind's audit surface.

entries.title: nomad
entries.description: Companion plugin for the claude-nomad CLI. Adds /nomad:pull, /nomad:push, /nomad:doctor, /nomad:diff, and /nomad:clean slash commands plus a session-start drift-warning hook, so you can sync ~/.claude/ across machines without leaving Claude Code. Requires the standalone claude-nomad npm CLI.

entries.title: yana-ai
entries.description: Personal agent operating system for Claude Code. Safety hooks, memory tiers, agents, commands, and cross-engine hard enforcement.

entries.title: phovia
entries.description: Phovia memory hooks and local MCP search for Claude Code, with device login.

entries.title: agency
entries.description: Harness-in-harness agency engine: code-mode capabilities (macroskills) over one provenance graph.

entries.title: agent

entries.title: gander
entries.description: A live Hollywood-Squares dashboard of your Claude Code agents and sub-agents — each one an animated avatar that acts out what it's doing (thinking, coding, reading, spawning, testing, erroring), with a recursive hierarchy view and animated information flow between parent and child agents. Driven automatically by Claude Code hooks.

entries.title: aco
entries.description: Drive a live Appium session from Claude Code with the aco CLI — start/stop sessions, find elements, tap, swipe, type, screenshot, read page source, switch web contexts, and call platform mobile: extensions on iOS simulators/emulators and real devices.

entries.title: hecateflow
entries.description: Reusable, MCU-agnostic embedded-development skill system (13 skills): interactive workspace/target init, incremental module design & implementation, behavior-preserving refactor, deep review, and an always-on per-edit safety gate. v1.1 adds hardware-mapping headers with a single-source polarity/magnitude truth, a cross-platform lessons memory (record/recall/avoid/promote), tiered context-saving docs, auto-injection of rules/skills, clangd config management, multi-target IO-ownership planning, and relative-path discipline. Distilled from a real multi-core bare-metal C project.

entries.description: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entries.description: Harness for Claude Code — skills, /harness:* slash commands, persona subagents, lifecycle hooks, and MCP tools without per-repo `harness setup`. Sibling plugins exist for Cursor, Gemini CLI, and Codex.

entries.title: insane-review
entries.description: GPT-5.5 Pro(웹 전용·API 없음)를 Claude Code 안에서 활용 — repomix로 관련 코드만 정밀 패킹 → 구독 ChatGPT Pro에 투입 → 분석/의견 회수. agent-council 웹 전용 멤버로도 통합.

entries.title: grest-ts
entries.description: Framework conventions, anti-patterns, and per-package reference docs for grest-ts. Activates whenever Claude works in a project that uses @grest-ts/* packages.

entries.title: langlearn-tts-dev
entries.description: Suppress MCP tool output for langlearn-tts in Claude Code.

entries.title: cinematic-scroll
entries.description: Build cinematic, scroll-driven websites — pinned chapter reveals, multi-depth parallax, 3D tilt, environment-morphing backgrounds, and full release/launch pages. The motion grammar is the skill; the aesthetic is always the user's. Single self-contained scroll sections (Mode A) or a full Next.js release site with GSAP/Lenis + AI-generated visuals (Mode B), via a 5-phase gated pipeline with taste guardrails, 12 scroll patterns, and a transform/opacity performance budget.

entries.title: my-claude
entries.description: Dynamic orchestrator plugin — 200+ agents, 200+ skills, hooks, and MCP servers. Upstream sources linked via git submodules (agency-agents, everything-claude-code, oh-my-claudecode, gstack, superpowers)

entries.title: create-kr-patch
entries.description: 레트로 게임(SNES·메가드라이브·새턴·PS1·드림캐스트·PC엔진·PC-98·게임기어 등) 한글 패치 제작 전 파이프라인 Agent Skill. ROM/디스크 분석부터 폰트·인코딩 설계, PoC, 추출·번역·재삽입, 빌드, 에뮬레이터 검증까지.

entries.title: intelligo

entries.title: nature-skills
entries.description: A growing collection of Claude skills for producing academic work at Nature-journal standard. Covers scientific figures (nature-figure), manuscript prose polishing (nature-polishing), citation retrieval and export (nature-citation), data availability statements and FAIR metadata (nature-data), and paper-to-PPTX presentation conversion (nature-paper2ppt). Future releases planned: statistical reporting, peer-review responses, methods writing, cover letters, and review articles. All rules derived from primary sources — published Nature papers, journal author guidelines, and structured writing curricula.

entries.title: chameleon
entries.description: Code that blends in. Auto-derives codebase conventions and injects archetype-aware guidance for AI-generated code.

entries.title: purist

entries.title: falsegreen-skill

Requires the superpowers and figma companion plugins.

entries.title: chuzom
entries.description: Smart LLM routing with Claude subscription monitoring, complexity-first model selection, and 20+ AI providers

entries.title: clawdcursor
entries.description: Safe cross-OS desktop & browser control for Claude Code — the fallback execution layer for when APIs, CLIs, and direct integrations aren't available. Registers the clawdcursor MCP server in compact mode and bundles its usage skill (the SKILL.md at the repo root). Requires Node.js 20+; the MCP server launches via npx, which fetches clawdcursor on demand (or uses your global install if present) — no separate install step.

entries.title: mumei
entries.description: Quality Enforcement Layer for Claude Code — Hook-gated SDD (spec & plan vehicles), Wave commits, and grounded multi-agent code review.

entries.title: skills
entries.description: Personal skills for Kubernetes, infrastructure, and cloud engineering workflows

entries.title: arbor
entries.description: Run Arbor's hypothesis-tree research workflow inside Claude Code using your own model — no API key. Bundles the Arbor Agent Skill suite and registers the keyless `arbor mcp` tools (Idea Tree, evaluation, worktrees, guarded merges, reports).

entries.title: claw-skills
entries.description: Collection of AI agent skills for Claude Code and OpenClaw

entries.title: beagle
entries.description: Code review skills and verification workflows for Python, Go, React, and AI frameworks

entries.title: context-mode
entries.description: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entries.title: context-mode
entries.description: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entries.title: clinpub
entries.description: End-to-end clinical data analysis and publication pipeline for SCI Q1/Q2 journals. Reads CSV/XLSX data, runs R-based statistical analysis, generates publication-grade figures, searches literature (PubMed), writes IMRAD manuscripts, and simulates peer review.

entries.title: pi-stuff
entries.description: pi-stuff — a plugin for Claude Code

entries.title: sdna
entries.description: SDNA (Sanctuary DNA) - Gnostic agent workflow DSL with skills for chain development

entries.title: gemini-manager
entries.description: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.

entries.title: bl1nk-visual-mcp
entries.description: Story analysis and visualization MCP server — converts narrative text into structured StoryGraph JSON with 16 tools for Mermaid, Canvas, Dashboard, and Markdown exports.

entries.title: gsd-core
entries.description: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entries.title: web-standards
entries.description: Web pack — Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn. Auto-invoke: nextjs + production-readiness (§R1–§R10) + craft-guide (§1–§15) standards; premium-signals (market-sourced precise values — shadow formula, OKLCH dark grays, easing, tabular-nums); taste (metric dials: DESIGN_VARIANCE/MOTION_INTENSITY/VISUAL_DENSITY, AI-tells forbidden list); i18n (conditional on next-i18next/react-i18next or locales/ dir). Audit commands delegate to core-standards:verify-changes. extract-tokens writes token source of truth. Platform-agnostic design skills (accessibility, information-architecture, aesthetic-coherence) moved to design-standards plugin.

entries.title: flutter-standards
entries.description: Flutter-specific standards — engineering (Dart, widget rules, data layer, api-data patterns), accessibility (Semantics, screen readers, 48dp touch targets), performance (DevTools, frame budget, const widgets). app-audit (full Flutter audit: pre-ship checks + craft quality + screen states). scaffold (feature + screen file structure generator). scan (hardcoded values, duplicate code, a11y patterns). Pair with mobile-standards for craft-guide, production-readiness, forms, and observability.

entries.title: specflow-claude
entries.description: Use Specflow workflows from Claude Code through the local specflow mcp server.

entries.title: daisyui-blueprint
entries.description: Official daisyUI MCP server. Requires a paid license from https://daisyui.com/blueprint

entries.title: mobile-standards
entries.description: Mobile-universal standards — craft quality, production readiness, forms, observability, design tokens. Applies to Flutter, React Native, SwiftUI, Jetpack Compose. Auto-invoked by description triggers.

entries.title: api-standards
entries.description: API pack — NestJS + Prisma. Auto-invoke: nestjs + code-quality standards, cross-stack-contracts (active when craft.json stacks has 2+ entries: unified error shape, cursor pagination, Bearer header standard, versioned routes), websockets (conditional on socket.io/ws usage: connection auth, backoff reconnect, event enum, schema versioning). db-migrations workflow (Prisma schema → migration → client regeneration).

entries.title: pair-goal
entries.description: Goal-driven improvement loop: understand what needs improving, forge a /goal completion condition, then race a different-model Claude against Codex (each in its own git worktree) round by round until the goal is met, summarize, and ship a PR.

entries.title: core-standards
entries.description: Cross-stack engine and universal skills. work-principles, planning, universal-rules, verification, verify-changes, codebase-index, auth-flows, craft-config, subagent-brief, honesty (no unsourced claims, evidence before done), spec-validator, contracts, challenger, contract-tests, integration, full-setup — production autonomous pipeline from single prompt to verified delivery.

entries.title: ultra-explainer
entries.description: Turn code, systems, diffs, plans, data, and concepts into strikingly clear self-contained HTML — re-skinned by a 'chameleon studio' of seven distinct design languages (blueprint, editorial, terminal, instrument, notebook, swiss, luminous) chosen to fit the subject. Node-edge graphs, annotated diffs, honest charts, interactive models, step-throughs, themed Mermaid, slides; light/dark themes and an optional glow layer.

entries.title: gipity
entries.description: Gipity cloud for Claude Code - hosting, Postgres databases, serverless functions, auth, file storage, realtime, and AI services (image, speech, LLM), all driven by the gipity CLI. Build, deploy, and verify live apps without leaving your session.

entries.title: clairvoyance
entries.description: A force multiplier for agent-to-human handoffs, turning work into evidence-backed decisions humans can trust.

entries.title: skill-author
entries.description: Add or modify an installable Claude Code skill in this repo — produce a spec-compliant SKILL.md, bundle its scripts/references, and register it in the marketplace. Use when authoring a new skill or editing an existing one.

entries.title: hyperframes
entries.description: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entries.title: hamakom-osint
entries.description: המקום אוסינט — תחקיר מעל מסד ה-OSINT הממשלתי של 'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום': פטורים ממכרז (osint-exemptions), תיק ישות מצולב (osint-entity-dossier), לידים יומיים (osint-daily-leads), כנסת (osint-knesset), תכנון (osint-planning), ותכנון יו"ש (osint-yosh-planning). כולל את שרת ה-MCP המרוחק osint-db (5 כלים: list_tables, describe_table, query_db, search_entity, new_since).

entries.title: gen-suno
entries.description: Write Suno-ready song lyrics and generate the audio via the gen-suno CLI. Two modes: one-off songs about any topic, or a chained prerequisite album engineered for memorization with clearly-enunciated, intelligible vocals.

entries.title: ai-instruction-kits-core
entries.description: AI指示書キットのコアスキル（安全なコミット等）

entries.title: memex-checkout
entries.description: Memex spec-checkout — binds your coding thread to a Spec and records in-flow edits against it (claim-gated, privacy-first). Non-blocking, opt-in, uninstallable any time. Sends only changed file paths + the claimed spec; never source code or prompts.

entries.title: hamakom-factcheck
entries.description: המקום פאקטצ'ק — אימות עבור 'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום': תוכן ויראלי ומקור ראשוני (hamakom-factcheck), נתונים וסטטיסטיקה (-data), ציטוטים וייחוס (-quote), גיאולוקיישן וזמן (-geo), פורנזיקת תמונה/וידאו (-visual), ואימות כתבה לפני פרסום בלי עריכת טקסט (hamakom-article-verify). חלק מסקילי הנתונים/ציטוטים נשענים על osint-db (פלאגין hamakom-osint).

entries.title: promptdown-docs
entries.description: Base de conhecimento do projeto promptdown-ui-v3: SPA vanilla, design system dark minimalista, backend mock e setup multi-agente.

entries.title: humanise
entries.description: Strip LLM 'tells' from output. Steers prose to read human-written and deterministically cleans em dashes, smart quotes, emojis, and AI-overused words from any file Claude writes.

entries.title: rule-trace
entries.description: Make AI-agent rule application visible and auditable: stable rule IDs, a catalog, response-time trace blocks, cross-session usage counters, severity + waiver semantics, and a deterministic validator that guards catalog/heading correspondence and importer drift.

entries.title: clawcast
entries.description: Turns what your Claude Code agents build into a daily two-host podcast. A SessionEnd + debounced Stop hook generate your episode locally and ship ONLY the finished script (never raw transcripts) to clawcast.fm.

entries.title: hamakom-visuals
entries.description: נכסי המדיה הוויזואליים של 'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום' — גרפיקות כתבה (hamakom-graphic), קרוסלות אינסטגרם (hamakom-carousel), ורילים (hamakom-reel). עיצוב מותג אחיד: NextExit + Narkiss Tam, אדום #f70d28.

entries.title: lightbridge
entries.description: Personal workflow conventions — bootstrap and manage the .lightbridge/ per-repo config namespace.

entries.title: searchfit-seo
entries.description: AI-powered SEO toolkit customized for ha-makom.co.il — Hebrew (RTL) news SEO for an Israeli investigative-journalism site on WordPress + Yoast. Audit, plan content, optimize articles, generate NewsArticle schema, cluster Hebrew keywords, and track AI visibility. Based on the free SearchFit.ai toolkit.

entries.title: agent-skills
entries.description: Portable skills in the open Agent Skills (SKILL.md) standard.

entries.title: chrome-devtools-mcp
entries.description: Reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis in Chrome using Chrome DevTools and Puppeteer

entries.title: ambience
entries.description: AI-assisted authoring and diagnosis for Ambience (Home Assistant) scene configuration. Bundles the ambience-author skill and the /ambience-create and /ambience-fix commands.

entries.title: cad-drafting
entries.description: CAD drafting skills for Claude Code — survey/cadastral geometry intelligence, DXF generation, layer/ObjectData standards, and package validation conventions.

entries.title: harness
entries.description: Portable read-only advisor agents, profile-driven PR/ticket skills, enforcement hooks, and a self-adapting /harness-init that tailors any repo to a documented index pattern.

entries.title: appstore-precheck
entries.description: Read-only iOS App Store pre-submission check: scans 20 rejection vectors, wraps Apple's fastlane precheck, watches guideline drift, and runs an adversarial reviewer pass before you submit.

entries.title: ship
entries.description: Ship code changes with a structured git workflow: add, commit, pull --rebase, push

entries.title: hamakom-desk
entries.description: ניהול מערכת ואסטרטגיה ל'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום' — סנכרון וורדפרס↔נושן (hamakom-investigations-sync), ליינאפ שבועי (hamakom-weekly-lineup), ניוזלטר שבועי (hamakom-weekly-newsletter), וניתוח DNA מערכתי ופערי סיקור (site-strategist).

entries.title: archmantic
entries.description: Query a grounded architecture model of your codebase over MCP — capability map, diagrams, data model, API surface, dependencies — instead of reading whole files. ~98% fewer tokens; every answer grounded to file:line. Ships a skill so your agent reaches for it automatically.

entries.title: skill-creator-enhanced
entries.description: Create, fork, evaluate, and iteratively improve Claude skills. Forks Anthropic's skill-creator with built-in guidance on composability, layered tooling, deterministic scripts, and a self-update compounding loop.

entries.title: coding
entries.description: Software engineering workflows: commits, reviews, refactoring, and language idioms.

entries.title: gen-image
entries.description: Generate one or more educational/explanatory images from a text prompt via the gen-image CLI and return ready-to-paste image links. For explicit, user-requested generation (single or batch).

entries.title: pact-agents
entries.description: 24 Pact/KDA-CE skills, 16 instructions, 20 slash commands, 1 security agent, and CI scripts for Kadena smart contract development.

entries.title: radiology
entries.description: Medical-imaging tooling references: DICOM via DCMTK, the Orthanc REST API, and 3D Slicer.

entries.title: cursor-acp-bridge
entries.description: MCP server that drives cursor-agent over the Agent Client Protocol (ACP): delegate coding tasks to Cursor from Claude Code, with auto-approved writes and clarifying questions surfaced via elicitation.

entries.title: tidal-diagram-skills
entries.description: Build diagrams in the Tidal Diagrams app from a prompt, and export them to Figma as editable layers.

entries.title: genvid-skills
entries.description: Genvid reference skill pack — teaches any MCP-capable agent to drive the Genvid governed boundary.

entries.title: biookf
entries.description: BioOKF: curate, visualize, and reason over biomedical Open Knowledge Format bundles. Bundles the bokf MCP server (curation + analysis + live BioOKF Studio GUI control), the bokf CLI, and the prebuilt BioOKF Studio desktop app. The Studio is shipped precompiled; the first run downloads the binaries for your platform from GitHub Releases, so no local compile is required.

entries.title: hamakom-leads
entries.description: המקום לידים — בריף לידים ועורך בוקר ל'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום', ישירות מ-osint-db (חדשות מ-33 מקורות + רשומות ממשלתיות חדשות). מדרג לפי DNA, מחבר חדשות↔דאטה, ומצב פיץ' עומק. האיסוף ב-osint-db (פלאגין hamakom-osint); כאן הבחירה והדירוג.

entries.title: creative-skills
entries.description: Creative skills including SVG animation and design

entries.title: dfos
entries.description: Install, configure, and use the DFOS protocol CLI: identities, content chains, credentials, services, and relays.

entries.title: openair-3-mcp-client-plugin-oss
entries.description: openair MCP harness — manuals, workflow recipes, multi-MCP bridge. Pair with openair-3-mcp-server-oss v0.2+.

entries.title: ivalt-agent-auth
entries.description: Human-in-the-loop biometric approval with PKI-signed attestation. Pauses an agent at a sensitive step, pushes to the approver's phone for FaceID/fingerprint approval, and returns a signed attestation (biometric + location + time + device).
